title: Development Workflow
steps: Gather task context: `tasks_get(taskId)` to read full description, subtasks, blockers, and linked items
Check for existing recipes: `skills_recall(taskDescription)` — if a skill matches, follow its steps instead
Find relevant code: `code_search(query)` by semantic meaning, then `code_get_symbol(id)` for full source of functions to modify
Check prior knowledge: `notes_search(area)` for gotchas, ADRs, and workarounds left by previous work
Verify docs match code: `docs_cross_references(symbol)` on key symbols you will change
Check linked tasks: `tasks_find_linked(filePath)` on files you will edit — avoid conflicting with in-progress work
Implement the change following project rules: strict TypeScript, port/adapter architecture, no `any`
Write or update tests in `tests/` for any new behaviour
Run `npm test` — fix failures before proceeding
Run `npm run build` if UI was changed — fix build errors
Capture non-obvious decisions or workarounds: `notes_create` + `notes_create_link` to relevant code
If you used an existing skill, call `skills_bump_usage(skillId)`
inputHints: Task ID from GraphMemory or clear description of what to change
Access to Graph Memory MCP server
